column6: Please note that this Supplemental Compound: "kavīndrakarṇābharaṇa" must receive the SAME Triple Indentation as the previous Compound "kavīndrakalpataru [ID=46595]" occurring in the Hierarchy List Display Column. The pūrvapada here being "kavīndra", itself is already Double-Indented! Therefore, BOTH of the following (sibling) compounds must be Triply so.

column7: Typo – Please note that this is a possible "Print Change", pending approval by Dr. Dhaval.

Typo – Please note that the pūrvapada is in fact FEMININE, and retains the long vowel so that we have: "kaśā + trayam". Therefore, this equation MUST be corrected in the Window Display along with the Headword itself. "kaśaḥ + -trayam"  ——TO BECOME—— "kaśā + -trayam". Of course, the citation provided confirms this correction as well: samyak kaśātrayavicāravatā niyuktaḥ Śi.
